title: Argentinian Chocolate Crumble
description: A rich and decadent dessert featuring Argentinian chocolate and a crunchy crumble topping

ingredients.name: bitter melon
ingredients.notes: optional, for a sweet and tangy twist

instructions: Melt the chocolate in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30-second increments, stirring between each interval.
In a separate bowl, combine the flour, sugar, and ground almonds for the crumble topping.
Add the unsalted butter to the dry ingredients and rub until the mixture resembles coarse breadcrumbs.
Press half of the crumble mixture into the bottom of a 20cm square baking dish.
Pour the melted chocolate over the crumble base.
Top with the remaining crumble mixture.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the crumble is golden brown and the chocolate is set.
Allow the dessert to cool completely in the pan before slicing and serving.
